common.createProfileToStart: Create a profile to get started.
common.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this profile?
common.confirmLogout: Are you sure you want to log out?
common.notFoundDesc: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been removed.
common.importError: Failed to import profile. Please ensure the format is correct and try again.

auth.welcomeBack: Welcome back, please enter your credentials
auth.protectInternet: Protect your first hop on the internet
auth.noAccount: Don't have an account? Sign up now
auth.haveAccount: Already have an account? Back to login
auth.formatTipPassword: Password tip: 12-100 characters, containing letters, numbers, and special characters
auth.authFailed: Authentication failed, check username or password
auth.networkError: Network error, please try again later
auth.turnstileError: Verification service failed to load, please reload the page and try again
auth.passwordLeaked: Your password was found in a public data breach. For your security, please use a strong random password.
auth.usernameExists: This username is already taken. Please try another one.

setup.title: Setup Guide
setup.subtitle: Configure your devices to use Obex DNS and master your internet security.
setup.profileMismatch: Using Obex, but Profile ID mismatch.
setup.dohDesc: DNS over HTTPS (DoH) is a protocol for performing remote DNS resolution via the HTTPS protocol.
setup.dohBenefit2: Enhances DNS resolution and overall security
setup.browserSteps: Settings > Privacy and security > Security > Use secure DNS > Custom > Paste URL.
setup.browserTips: Or paste this into your address bar:
setup.appleDesc: Apple devices support quick configuration via profiles.
setup.appleWarning: Profiles cannot be installed in 'Lockdown Mode'. Please ensure your system is not in this state.
setup.appleInstallHint: After downloading, go to 'Settings' > 'Profile Downloaded' to install.
setup.windowsStep1: Properties > DNS server assignment > Edit > Manual.
setup.windowsStep3: Enable DoH (manual template) and paste URL.
setup.androidDesc: Recommended to use apps like Intra, fill in DoH URL manually.
setup.androidWarning: Note: System 'Private DNS' uses DoT protocol, Obex currently supports DoH only.
setup.linuxDesc: Run a local DNS proxy to forward queries to Obex via DoH.
setup.linuxStep1: Run this script to install cloudflared and setup systemd service (listening on 127.0.0.1:53).

rules.title: Custom Rules
rules.subtitle: Manually control DNS behavior for specific domains (Allow, Block, or Redirect).
rules.noRulesDesc: You haven't added any manual rules yet.
rules.duplicatePattern: Rule for this domain already exists

logs.title: Query Logs
logs.subtitle: View DNS resolution logs and block history.
logs.noRecordsDesc: No DNS queries received in the selected timeframe.

filtering.title: External Filters
filtering.subtitle: Subscribe to third-party blocklists (e.g., AdGuard).
filtering.formatDisclaimer: This system only supports a limited set of AdGuard format lists and plain domain lists. Only basic blocking rules (e.g., ||example.com^) are supported, and "@@" whitelist rules will be bypassed. "$" rewrite rules and "*" wildcard/omit rules are temporarily not supported. The system will automatically match all subdomains of the domains.
filtering.noListsDesc: You haven't subscribed to any external blocklists yet.
filtering.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this list subscription?

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage resolution policies and advanced options.
settings.upstreamDesc: Unblocked queries will be forwarded to this server. Supports DoH (HTTPS) or Classic DNS (e.g., 1.1.1.2). DoH is recommended for speed and security. Classic DNS uses TCP.
settings.retentionDesc: Expired logs will be cleared automatically from D1.
settings.noRecordsReturned: No records returned for this query.
settings.blockModeDesc: Response content when a domain is blocked

account.title: Account Settings
account.subtitle: Manage your security credentials and system users.
account.clearLogsDesc: This will delete all resolution logs for all your profiles. This cannot be undone.
account.deleteAccountDesc: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. You will lose all DNS configurations.
account.formatTipPassword: Password tip: 12-100 characters, containing letters, numbers, and special characters
account.confirmDeleteUser: Are you sure you want to delete this user? All their profiles will be removed.
account.confirmClearLogs: Are you sure you want to clear all logs? This cannot be undone.
account.confirmDeleteAccount:
WARNING: Are you sure you want to delete your account?

All DNS profiles, custom rules, and logs will be permanently deleted. This is irreversible!
account.inactivityDesc: Accounts with no resolution activity for 180 days will be automatically deleted, including configs and logs.

totp.title: Two-Factor Authentication (2FA)
totp.setupDesc: Add an extra layer of security to your account. Use Google Authenticator, Authy, or any TOTP-compatible app.
totp.scanQR: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app:
totp.enterCodeHint: Enter the 6-digit code to confirm the key was scanned correctly.
totp.skipPassword: Passwordless login — hide password field at login (TOTP only)
totp.disableWarning: After disabling 2FA, your account will only be protected by password. Are you sure?
totp.recoveryKeysWarning: Store these 8 keys safely (e.g., password manager). Each key can only be used once. You will NOT see them again after closing this dialog.

intro.item1Desc: Cloudflare Workers & D1 based DNS resolver, optimized for speed and security.
intro.item2Desc: Prevent hijacking and enhance privacy via DNS over HTTPS (RFC 8484) encryption.
intro.item3Desc: Extreme speed and ultra-low latency powered by Cloudflare's edge network.
intro.item4Desc: Full support for whitelist/blacklist, AdGuard rules, and custom DNS redirects.
intro.item5Desc: Gain insights into network health with detailed logs and comprehensive dashboards.
intro.item6Desc: High-density dashboard designed for power users, built with Blueprint UI.
intro.item7Desc: Serverless architecture ensures zero maintenance and infinite scalability.
intro.item8Desc: Manage independent configurations for different devices or environments.
